primary_failure: capacity_baseline.concert.seat_map failed with status 0 and concert-service health probes timed out

report_archive.note: The directory was created, but k6 summary files were not written because the job ended by deadline before normal summary handling.

notes: Kong rate limits were restored to 120 after the run.
DB logs did not include too many clients already, remaining connection slots, SQLAlchemy QueuePool, or OperationalError patterns.

PostgreSQL logged unexpected EOF and connection to client lost after service pod health failures, which is interpreted as a consequence of client/pod termination rather than the original connection-budget failure.
